title: MkDocs GitHub Pages Deployment Workflow
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for mkdocs github pages deployment workflow
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Sequence the eleven deployment steps from editing markdown locally to a live site served from the GitHub Pages CDN
Distinguish the roles of the main branch (markdown source) and the gh-pages branch (built HTML) in the dual-branch deployment strategy
Explain how the mkdocs gh-deploy command combines building the static site and force-pushing it to the gh-pages branch
Trace the validation loop that routes a failed mkdocs build back to local editing before any commit is pushed
Identify which workflow steps occur in each swimlane: local development, Git/GitHub, and the GitHub Pages service
